channel.title: SpotPulse Trending
channel.description: Live web pulse — India & Global intelligence dashboard.

item.title: How Vijay’s TVK Applied BJP-Level Strategy To Reshape Tamil Nadu Politics
item.description: The BJP’s rise under Modi and Shah was about building a party machine and a booth-level management system. TVK replicated this almost exactly.

item.title: CJI Surya Kant condemns viral fake casteist quote falsely attributed to him, warns of legal action: 'Prepared to bring…'
item.description: The Chief Justice of India Surya Kant's office denied a false casteist statement attributed to him on social media, calling it ‘vile and mischievous’. The office clarified that Justice Surya Kant never made the remarks circulating online.

item.title: Stock markets likely to stay volatile this week amid US-Iran tensions, crude oil concerns - The Times of India
item.description: Stock markets likely to stay volatile this week amid US-Iran tensions, crude oil concerns The Times of India

item.title: PM Modi rolls out Rs 9,400 crore Telangana package, spotlights textile revolution
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi launched infrastructure and industrial projects worth nearly Rs 9,400 crore in Telangana. He inaugurated the PM MITRA Park in Warangal, the country's first fully operational textile park. The projects aim to boost manufacturing and connectivity, with a focus on the textile sector. Several road, railway, and logistics projects were also unveiled.

item.title: CITU calls South Coast Railway zone a “betrayal” of Andhra Pradesh, flags revenue loss
item.description: The trade union has cited revenue diversion to Odisha’s East Coast Railway, vacant safety posts and the choice of Mudasarlova as zonal headquarters. The TDP and BJP have hailed the gazette notification

item.title: Air taxi patent wars; China ZTE-Samsung rate setting; FBI warns of AI-enabled IP theft; landmark Xoma buyout; Access Advance CEO interview; plus much more - IAM Media
item.description: Air taxi patent wars; China ZTE-Samsung rate setting; FBI warns of AI-enabled IP theft; landmark Xoma buyout; Access Advance CEO interview; plus much more IAM Media

item.title: Iran war ceasefire tested as cargo ship catches fire and Kuwait reports drone attack - Barchart.com
item.description: Iran war ceasefire tested as cargo ship catches fire and Kuwait reports drone attack Barchart.com

item.title: RCB vs MI prediction: Who’ll win, Royal Challengers Bengaluru or Mumbai Indian? We asked ChatGPT
item.description: Tonight's IPL match sees RCB clashing with MI. We asked AI to predict tonight's winner.

item.title: From the Opinions Editor: In Delhi’s Yamuna floodplains and elsewhere, environment protection is going against the poor - India IPO
item.description: From the Opinions Editor: In Delhi’s Yamuna floodplains and elsewhere, environment protection is going against the poor India IPO

item.title: West Bengal Election Data Reveals Sharp Divide In Turnout, Victory Margins, Electoral Roll Revision
item.description: The BJP registered the largest winning margins in North Bengal, while minority-dominated border seats recorded the highest SIR deletions.

item.title: Two gelatin sticks found near PM Modi's venue in Bengaluru, one detained
item.description: Modi was in Bengaluru and had gone to Art of Living Centre on Kanakapura Road near Kaggalipura to commemorate its 45th foundation day.

item.title: Suvendu aide's murder: Probe hinges on links with UP and UPI
item.description: Investigators trace UP contacts via car, track digital payment at toll plaza; assailants knew target's seating position, executed killing in under a minute

item.title: Suvendu aide's murder: Probe hinges on links with UP and UPI | India News - Hindustan Times
item.description: Suvendu aide's murder: Probe hinges on links with UP and UPI | India News Hindustan Times

item.title: IPL 2026 RCB vs MI Live Score, Playing 11 Updates: Bengaluru begin Raipur leg with match vs struggling Mumbai
₹1,600-1,700 crore a day, ₹1 lakh crore in 10 weeks: Cost of insulating India from global energy shock
item.description: While countries from Japan to the United Kingdom have raised petrol and diesel prices by up to 30% since the start of the West Asia conflict, fuel prices in India continue at two-year-old levels

item.title: Iran military warns of ‘surprising’ methods of warfare if attacked again
item.description: Iran’s army spokesman says if the ‘enemy’ were to attack again, they would face new methods of warfare.

item.title: India successfully tests Agni-5 MIRV missile with 5,000 km range, multi-warhead capability; 5 key facts
item.description: The missile was tested with multiple payloads aimed at different targets spread across a wide geographical area in the Indian Ocean region

item.title: Spain starts evacuating virus-hit cruise ship in Tenerife
item.description: Spanish passengers are the first to leave the MV Hondius, after an outbreak saw three people die and several infected.

item.title: India today is far less fragile than before: Nippon India MF’s Sailesh Raj Bhan
item.description: Nippon India Mutual Fund's CIO Sailesh Raj Bhan says India's economy is structurally more resilient than in previous cycles, and current market weakness represents an accumulation opportunity for long-term investors.

item.title: 200 units free electricity, ‘white paper’ on Stalin's DMK: Vijay's top-5 announcements as Tamil Nadu chief minister
item.description: After he took oath as Tamil Nadu chief minister, in the presence of his party's alliance leaders including Rahul Gandhi, Vijay assured a “transparent government” which will work towards improving social justice.

item.title: Three-hour meeting fails to end impasse over Congress Chief Minister for Kerala
item.description: Deepa Dasmunsi, party general secretary in charge of Kerala, told the media after the meeting that the high command had time until May 23 to finalise the candidate; senior leaders said party chief Mallikarjun Kharge and Lok Sabha LoP Rahul Gandhi were visibly dismayed by the poster wars and public marches

item.title: Prime Minister Narendra Modi attacks Congress on ‘betrayal of allies’
item.description: DMK was always working for the good of the Congress, and on several occasions, DMK has bailed Congress out of trouble,” the Prime Minister said

item.title: Ukraine War, Day 1,537: Russia Breaks "Victory Day" Ceasefire - EA WorldView
item.description: Ukraine War, Day 1,537: Russia Breaks "Victory Day" Ceasefire EA WorldView

item.title: Spyware Attack: How Thousands of Private Messages and Photos of a British Celebrity Were Leaked - The Sunday Guardian
item.description: Spyware Attack: How Thousands of Private Messages and Photos of a British Celebrity Were Leaked The Sunday Guardian

item.title: Car bomb attack in northwest Pakistan kills at least 14 police personnel - India Today
item.description: Car bomb attack in northwest Pakistan kills at least 14 police personnel India Today

item.title: US-Iran War News LIVE Updates: 9 Dead As Israel Strikes Lebanon Despite Truce
item.description: US-Iran War Live Updates

item.title: Quote of the Day by Ijeoma Umebinyuo: ‘So many broken children living in grown bodies…'
item.description: Quote of the Day: Nigerian-American author Ijeoma Umebinyuo once talked about how childhood trauma can impact lives even after years. Here's what she said.

item.title: "Society More Powerful Than Government": PM Modi At Art Of Living Event
item.description: PM Narendra Modi praised various welfare activities undertaken by The Art of Living Foundation

item.title: 22% rally in one month! Why is Vodafone Idea share price skyrocketing?
item.description: Vodafone Idea share price descended over 3% in terms of year-to-date (YTD), however, has gained 68% in a year. Here's what's behind the rally and share price trend.

item.title: Hantavirus-Hit Cruise Ship Begins Evacuation in Canary Islands
item.description: A cruise ship at the center of a deadly hantavirus outbreak is starting the process of evacuating passengers in Spain’s Canary Islands, almost a month after the contagious disease broke out.

item.title: ‘Parasitic Congress’: PM Modi's sharp attack as Rahul Gandhi attends Vijay's swearing-in
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi berated the Congress for breaking up with longtime ally DMK in Tamil Nadu, and alleged that the party turns on its own partners.

item.title: Bonus issues, stock splits & dividends: SBI among 18 stocks turning ex-date this week. Do you own any?
item.description: A total of 18 stocks will turn ex-date for corporate actions like dividends and bonus issues next week, with prominent names including State Bank of India and Godrej Consumer Products. Investors must hold shares by the record date to be eligible for these benefits.

item.title: A shared songbook, Runa Laila reassuring constant in delicate Indo-Bangla ties
item.description: Runa Laila, celebrating 50 years in Hindi films, continues to bridge India and Bangladesh through her music. Her powerful voice, first heard in 'Ek Se Badhkar Ek,' has been a constant amidst political shifts. Receiving the Minar-e-Dilli award, she emphasized music's healing power, a sentiment echoed by fans who find solace in her melodies.

item.title: AAP calls ED's arrest of Punjab minister Sanjeev Arora ‘politically motivated’, BJP hits back
item.description: The arrest, which occurred after the central agency registered a new case against Arora under the criminal sections of the Prevention of Money Laundering Act

item.title: Iran Vs U.S Over Strait of Hormuz BREAKING: Iran TO SEIZE Undersea Internet Cables | Digital War? - Oneindia
item.description: Iran Vs U.S Over Strait of Hormuz BREAKING: Iran TO SEIZE Undersea Internet Cables | Digital War? Oneindia

item.title: Swiggy, magicpin say delivery times improving as gig workers return to cities
item.description: Delivery times are improving as gig workers return to cities. This follows the recent state elections and the peak harvest season. Food delivery platforms like Swiggy and magicpin expect a normalisation of services soon. This return of delivery partners will boost rider availability. The sector anticipates growth after a challenging period.

item.title: Booking.com confirms cyberattack: the leak in Andorra exposes data and causes WhatsApp messages to steal banking information - apd.cat
item.description: Booking.com confirms cyberattack: the leak in Andorra exposes data and causes WhatsApp messages to steal banking information apd.cat

item.title: Japan rushing to counter threat of cyberattack from Mythos AI model - 朝日新聞
item.description: Japan rushing to counter threat of cyberattack from Mythos AI model 朝日新聞

item.title: Delhi High Court reserves order in C-DOT-Utimaco dispute over emergency alert rollout
item.description: The ruling on the Centre’s no-tender decision could determine whether India’s nationwide cell broadcast rollout proceeds exclusively through C-DOT or is opened to competitive bidding.

item.title: A UPI Payment At Toll Plaza That May Lead Cops To Suvendu Adhikari Aide's Killers
item.description: Chandranath Rath was a former Indian Air Force employee
